{{Quote|The human exudes smokey darkness, weariness and disgust, baked into his being by the twin suns of Tatooine. He fancies himself an adept lawman but his hunting instincts have long been blunted.|Balu as described by Feltipern Trevagg|audio=PredneBalu.flac|<ref name="Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale">{{StoryCite|story=Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''Predne Balu''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Assistant [[Imperial Army/Legends|Security Officer]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He was a coworker of [[Feltipern Trevagg/Legends|Feltipern Trevagg]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Trevagg, leave the girl alone.|Balu|audio=LeaveTheGirlAlone.flac|<ref name="Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale">{{StoryCite|story=Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
Trevagg caught sight of [[M'iiyoom Onith/Legends|M'iiyoom Onith]], a female [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]]. Balu warned Feltipern to "leave the girl alone" when he was attempting to bed her. However, stubborn Trevagg didn't listen to him, and was killed during their mating ritual. Balu's surprised reaction to [[Wuher/Legends|Wuher's]] fingering of [[M'iiyoom Onith/Legends|M'iiyoom Onith]] in Trevagg's murder suggests that Balu did not know of the danger Trevagg was in.

As a security officer, Balu patrolled the streets of Mos Eisley. He wore dark blue pants and vest, gray shirt, and tan holster and belt.

==Behind the scenes==
In the audio dramatization of ''[[Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale]]'', the character was voiced by [[Russell Horton]].
